home.subtitle: Your financial obligations, organized.
home.demoSubtitle: All figures are demonstration data. Not a real account.

obligations.title: Obligations
obligations.emptySubtitle: Obligations you add will appear here.

obligationDetail.title: Obligation Detail
obligationDetail.phaseNote: Detailed calculation view coming in a future update.
obligationDetail.notFoundSubtitle: This obligation may have been removed or the link is invalid.

onboarding.languageSubtitle: You can change this later in Settings.
onboarding.introBody: Track loans, Islamic financing, and credit cards in one honest place. Every number is labeled by source and confidence.
onboarding.introFeatureProvenance: Every figure labeled by source and confidence
onboarding.introFeatureMath: Honest financial math — no hidden rounding
onboarding.consentBody: This demo uses fictional data for illustrative purposes only. All figures are invented — they do not represent real accounts, real balances, or real financial advice.
onboarding.consentAcknowledge: I understand this is demonstration data
onboarding.modeTitle: How do you want to start?
onboarding.modeDemoSubtitle: No account needed. Pre-loaded with realistic fictional obligations.
onboarding.modeManualSubtitle: Type in your obligations manually. Available after launch.
onboarding.modeAccountSubtitle: Secure cloud storage with full privacy controls. Available after launch.

learn.title: Learn
learn.subtitle: Understand loans, financing, and credit — in plain language.

rateIncreased.title: Rate increased
rateIncreased.body: Your interest rate increased from {{fromRate}}% to {{toRate}}%.

installmentUnchanged.title: Installment unchanged after rate increase
installmentUnchanged.body: Your installment remains {{installment}} JOD despite the rate increase. Your remaining balance may be higher than expected.

residualRisk.title: Residual balance risk
residualRisk.body: Based on your payment history and the rate change, your balance projection may exceed the original schedule. A calculation is pending.
